commands.name: backup
commands.description: Pulls all secrets in the cluster

options.name: --context
options.description: The kubectl config context to use

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace of services in kubernetes

options.name: --namespace-includes
options.description: The namespace keyword of services in kubernetes

options.name: --namespace-regex
options.description: The namespace regex to search for services in kubernetes

options.name: --excluded-namespace
options.description: A list of namespaces that should not be included in the backup

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: find
commands.description: Searches for a value across all secrets in the cluster

options.name: --context
options.description: The kubectl config context to use

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace of services in kubernetes

options.name: --namespace-includes
options.description: The namespace keyword of services in kubernetes

options.name: --namespace-regex
options.description: The namespace regex to search for services in kubernetes

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: search-term
arguments.description: The text to search for in secrets

commands.name: pull
commands.description: Pulls secrets from kubernetes to a local file

options.name: --context
options.description: The kubectl config context to use

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace of services in kubernetes

options.name: --output
options.description: The file to write to

options.name: --unwrap-key
options.description: Unwrap a specific key (so we only output the value of this key)

options.name: --port-forward
options.description: Will run port-forwards and replace any Kubernetes service URLs in the config (requires the unwrap-key option as well)

options.name: --remove-json-field
options.description: Will delete the listed fields from the unwrapped json secret value (requires the unwrap-key option as well)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: secret
arguments.description: The name of the secret in kubernetes

commands.name: push
commands.description: Pushes secrets from a local file into kubernetes

options.name: --context
options.description: The kubectl config context to use

options.name: --secret
options.description: The name of the secret in kubernetes

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace of services in kubernetes

options.name: --skip-prompts
options.description: Will not ask for confirmation before pushing secret

options.name: --auto-create-missing-namespace
options.description: Will automatically create the namespace if it does not exist

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: restore
commands.description: Pushes all secrets in a given folder

options.name: --context
options.description: The kubectl config context to use

options.name: --recursive
options.description: Will recursively push secrets

options.name: --skip-prompts
options.description: Will not ask for confirmation before pushing secrets

options.name: --auto-create-missing-namespaces
options.description: Will automatically create missing namespaces when pushing secrets

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: folder
arguments.description: The folder containing all the secret files to push

commands.name: update-value
commands.description: Replaces a value across all matching secrets in the cluster

options.name: --context
options.description: The kubectl config context to use

options.name: --old
options.description: The old value to search for and replace

options.name: --new
options.description: The new value to replace with

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace of services in kubernetes

options.name: --namespace-includes
options.description: The namespace keyword of services in kubernetes

options.name: --namespace-regex
options.description: The namespace regex to search for services in kubernetes

options.name: --skip-prompts
options.description: Will not ask for confirmation before updating secrets

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would be changed without making actual changes

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information
